subcodes.first_line: Remember thou My handmaiden, for verily He is her companion, her light and her succour in all the worlds of her Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری امتی و انه مونسها و نور لها و معینها فی کل عالم من عوالم ربها انه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for women, @spiritual transformation
